description.value:
Ace

The Ace is a born pilot, a natural behind the controls of any vehicle from a battered ground car to a screaming fighter craft. Whether threading a shuttle through an asteroid field, outrunning pursuit through hive city streets, or lining up a strafing run on a xenos encampment, the Ace is in their element when speed and reflexes matter most. They bring unmatched mobility and vehicular expertise to any warband fortunate enough to have one.

Role Aptitudes

Agility, Ballistic Skill, Defence, Perception, Tech

Role Talent

Hard Target or Hotshot Pilot

Role Bonus

Right Stuff: May spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed on an Operate or Dodge test while piloting a vehicle.

specialAbilities.name: Right Stuff
specialAbilities.description: May spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed on an Operate or Dodge test while piloting a vehicle.

system.notes: Hotshot Pilot: Count as having Operate at +10 for one vehicle type.
